user_task_description: This deck still contains one outdated appendix slide from a previous reporting cycle.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Delete the slide titled `Old Appendix (DELETE ME)`.
atomic_scope: Only slide deletion is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with the outdated slide removed.

inspired_by.title: Live Event Production: Managing PowerPoint decks

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The slide is fully formatted, so deletion requires confidence rather than obvious corruption
- The rest of the deck should remain unchanged
- Page order must stay coherent after deletion
